name: SIEBERT FINANCIAL CORP
summary: Siebert Financial Corp. is a financial services holding company operating through wholly-owned and majority-owned subsidiaries. The company is engaged in the securities industry, offering brokerage and related financial services. It operates in areas including retail brokerage, clearing functions, and related financial services, serving individual and institutional clients while subject to extensive regulatory oversight.
